---
title: "Links for Today"
crossref:
  lst-title: "🎯 Checkpoint 3."
  lst-labels: alpha a
format:
  live-html: 
    copy-code: true
sidebar: lesson-5
---

:::{.ltblue-container}
## **What Question Do You Want to Ask of the Data?**

[1. How does nitrate in a Knoxville creek (Second Creek) change over time?](#knoxville-explorers)

[2. How does nitrtate in a Greene County (Cove Creek) change over time?](#greene-county-explorers)

[3. How do the nitrate levels in Knoxville (Second Creek) and Greene County (Cove Creek) compare?](#creek-comparers)
:::

```{=html}
<style>
pre code {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-all;
}

.copy-wrapper {
  position: relative;
}

.copy-btn {
  position: absolute;
  top: 6px;
  right: 6px;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  background: #e2e8f0;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.copy-btn:hover { background: #cbd5e1; }
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  document.querySelectorAll("pre").forEach(pre => {
    const wrapper = document.createElement("div");
    wrapper.className = "copy-wrapper";
    pre.parentNode.insertBefore(wrapper, pre);
    wrapper.appendChild(pre);

    const btn = document.createElement("button");
    btn.className = "copy-btn";
    btn.textContent = "📋 Copy";
    btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(pre.innerText).then(() => {
        btn.textContent = "✅ Copied!";
        setTimeout(() => btn.textContent = "📋 Copy", 2000);
      });
    });
    wrapper.appendChild(btn);
  });
});
</script>
```

```
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSYCmPoxd222OlgfyWYIeUps7Mp4dnrWDDRTCs5PeOCMYp1HrEDKoNwg7mn8Tl0uh-lTBwvAwuIA2eK/pub?gid=0&single=true&output=csv
```

## Knoxville Explorers
***How does nitrate in Second Creek change over time?***

:::{.ltorange-container}
[Group 1 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1h0T4IRykOtky7Iv_pf9aAddzjFgDEg0igcYMwfBoKh4/edit?usp=sharing)   
[Group 2 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1GpcQni-Wo-TvYKGee2VjFfc_qIVsaz-kfR16popk4hw/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 3 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1y5XSYbBj33W-iER2kuVrhxSaPkaUOQF8UdtC6VTx8uw/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 4 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1All6zhkmT8Aa6NvfeUq3UbZyWZxbrj8BOLQaOjHZMgE/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 5 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1PdOmozmeQCIeMQ2A8azDGB92rljRLf0mKCeRW0uDyqU/edit?usp=sharing)  
:::

## Greene County Explorers
***How does nitrate in Cove Creek change over time?***

:::{.ltorange-container}
[Group 1 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1ruHVgrUvOyuf28x2hmXAO6s5jqASRiArH1AxD4Oc96I/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 2 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1gddZhKpL9ku4CqokB32fYTPRMJ0_JOVkqDWOiEPMQqE/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 3 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v2NC82svA8wX_JuN367S33hhQysuTgcUoSV-y7D7x_A/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 4 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Uvcisz3g39jW2xNzQWT_q3CBTg62B5goEY14nvXnmqE/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 5 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Y5LZNWrDH-VPHEiFvpe2bGxhHwzXaftllcm1k8sPwgs/edit?usp=sharing)  
:::

## Creek Comparers
***Which creek between Knoxville (Second Creek) and Greeneville (Cove Creek) has higher nitrate levels?***

:::{.ltorange-container}
[Group 1 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/15W9LS0vDYyljoSiF6EaAb4ucUdRQGJj0sBJYSJV6x_E/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 2 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/19Q6NFIKJcef5AgObZ82ai1ELfmEc89JQ8NwAnwP8T8w/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 3 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1FNWBmPAGPpYyE-DsS3l1GYa9TmdxHcsG0SFRSMCmnDQ/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 4 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Qj1QI4K5NrLNF-4r1NWrPFTZJ8gf1yYClUEJzK1Y-NE/edit?usp=sharing)  
[Group 5 Slides](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1uTCw-waQERuXU6MnSRQH5gXZpDph6kqa6nfZljRDCmg/edit?usp=sharing)  
:::
